description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the archlinux:latest Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs the following script commands in order: pacman -Syu --noconfirm --needed nodejs-lts-iron npm python python-poetry python-setuptools python-setuptools-scm python-pip python-wheel python-setuptools; cp -rv ResultData TFSThiagoBR98.AnimeThemeX.Web/public/api; cd TFSThiagoBR98.AnimeThemeX.Web/; npm install; npx ember build --environment production; cd ..; mv TFSThiagoBR98.AnimeThemeX.Web/dist public. Cache the node_modules directory at TFSThiagoBR98.AnimeThemeX.Web/node_modules/, publish the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and run this job only on the NeXT branch.
